metadata.description: 3-line status HUD with OAuth rate limits, transcript parsing, git status, config counts, and widget toggles

plugins.name: meicento-hud
plugins.description: 3-line status line: session (model, context bar, tokens, rate limits), stats (thinking, skills, call counts, todos), project (directory, git branch, config counts, session timer). Features OAuth usage API, JSONL transcript parsing, and interactive /configure command.
